repo_prior_art.cite: none; API ExactID/PartialID catalogues are empty and q1_spectral_phase_transition/pid_network_exposure/pid_dose_response_iv have no LP/SVAR fourth-cumulant boundary

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021 establishes LP/VAR portability under common identifying restrictions; LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017 supplies the non-Gaussian SVAR constraint but not this LP/SVAR set-inclusion comparison

repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest q1_spectral_phase_transition is a panel row-space threshold, while pid_network_exposure and pid_dose_response_iv are shared-completion/coupling partial-ID proposals

published_prior_art.cite: DrautzburgWright2023 refines sign-restricted VAR sets through independence; Guay2021 gives higher-moment local rank identification; neither states an open-class LP/sign versus single-law non-Gaussian SVAR support-function separation

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue LP/SVAR cumulant-filtered support-envelope theorem

published_prior_art.cite: DrautzburgWright2023 and LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017 motivate the filtered set; the theorem is a conditional support-envelope bookkeeping step once the margin is assumed

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue two-shock LP/SVAR cumulant-diagonalization witness

published_prior_art.cite: Read2022 gives sign/zero rotation algorithms and Guay2021/LanneLuoto2021 give higher-moment identification/estimation comparators, but not a closed-form LP/sign optimizer versus finite cumulant-diagonalizing set witness

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add LanneLiuLuoto2026 to the named literature checklist, not only the bibliography, because its dependent-shock non-Gaussian identification result is a close modern comparator for the fourth-cumulant locus.
State the generic open class in Conjecture 1 with one explicit rank/transversality condition ensuring the LP support argmax is separated from the cumulant-diagonalizing algebraic set.
For Conjecture 2, spell out whether the reflected component of O(2) is identified with the same target-column angle set or requires a second finite set in the displayed formula.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship open kernel and keep Theorem 1/Theorem 2 explicitly labelled as setup and conditional machinery.
